We have you covered: Unlimited $50,000/ year Buy Now How credits work 5 credits for a ready-to-use test (one-time charge). 10 credits for a custom test (one-time charge). 1 credit per candidate invite (if a candidate does not take the test, that credit is added back). Example: you get 1 custom test made (10 credits) and invite 90 candidates (90 credits). That's a total of 100 credits used. FAQs How do credits work? 5 credits for a ready-to-use test (one-time charge).10 credits for a custom test (one-time charge).1 credit per candidate invite (if a candidate does not take the test, that credit is added back).Example: you get 1 custom test made (10 credits) and invite 90 candidates (90 credits). That's a total of 100 credits used. Do the credits expire? For all plans, the credits expire 1 year after the purchase. What happens when I run out of credits? You can top up your account with the same or a different plan to continue inviting candidates. If we setup an assessment, can we use it indefinitely? Once you access a ready-to-use test (one time charge of 5 credits) or request a custom assessment (one time charge of 10 credits), you can use it as long as you're on a paid plan. What if a candidate does not attempt the assessment? You can cancel an unused invite and the credit is refunded to your account immediately. I have more questions. Who do I ask? Ping our support team via the chat button on the bottom right. Which tests are included in these pricing plans? All pricing plans include access to our entire test library of 500+ tests (on a credits basis). The test library spans tests for programming, data science and artificial intelligence, IT, cloud, accounting, finance, Excel, project management, design, aptitude, psychometric, language proficiency and typing skills.
